name: urban_planning_recall_notice_arrives_lumen_tru_loy
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Urban Planning, the situation tagged internally around urban planning recall notice arrives lumen tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Lumen City corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The trade is not abstract: it is truth versus loyalty under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Zara Diallo
agents.identity: I am Zara Diallo, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Urban Planning. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Gideon Morales
agents.identity: I am Gideon Morales, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Urban Planning. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with loyalty.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to loyalty to preserve operational truth.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Zara Diallo must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Zara Diallo do?
